name: Frase SEO Content Tool API
what_it_does: AI-powered SEO content research and writing platform with API — analyzing top search results to generate content briefs with topic coverage requirements, scoring content against competitors, assisting with AI writing suggestions, and providing SERP data for keyword research.
use_cases: Generating SEO content briefs for target keywords to guide writers via API
Querying SERP analysis data for keyword research and competitive content gap analysis
Integrating Frase content scores into CMS editorial workflow
Pulling related questions and topic data from Frase for content ideation pipelines
Automating content research compilation for agency content production workflows
not_for: Enterprise content intelligence with site-wide authority modeling (use MarketMuse)
Technical SEO auditing and crawl management
best_when: A content creator, agency, or small-to-mid content team wants affordable SERP-based content briefs, AI writing assistance, and optimization scoring in one tool.
avoid_when: You need enterprise site-authority modeling, technical SEO, or the most precise topic modeling (use MarketMuse for strategic depth).

auth.notes: API key from Frase account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-level access. No OAuth2 or scopes. No webhooks — polling required. API credits are consumed per query on some plans.

pricing.paid_tiers: Solo $15/month (4 articles); Basic $45/month (30 articles); Team $115/month (unlimited); Pro add-on $35/month for AI writing
pricing.notes: Boston-based company. Founded 2018. Raised $5M. One of the most affordable SEO content tools. Article-credit pricing on lower plans. Team plan with unlimited articles. AI writer integration on Pro add-on. Strong freelancer and small agency adoption. Frase + Pro bundle for full AI writing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for documents, SERP analysis, and content scoring. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation — help article rather than full API reference. Content analysis is synchronous for some endpoints, async for others. Document and project IDs required for content management operations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document reads idempotent. SERP data reads idempotent by keyword. Document creation creates new records — not idempotent by title.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation is a help article, not formal spec — limited detail
Article credits consumed per document creation on lower plans
SERP data freshness varies — specify fresh analysis vs cached
No webhooks — implement retry/polling for async SERP analysis
AI writing is separate Pro add-on with different quota from base plan

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. SEO content data has minimal PII sensitivity. Standard API key security practices apply.
